title: Ninja Foodi StaySharp Knife Block with Integrated Sharpener, 5-Piece Knife Set includes Chef, Bread, Slicing, Utility, Paring Knives, Stainless Steel K32005UK, Black
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: 5 PIECE KNIFE SET; Premium Kitchen knife set includes five knives – Chef Knife, Bread Knife, Slicing Knife, Utility Knife, Paring Knife
STARTS SHARP, STAYS SHARP; with an integrated StaySharp knife sharpener built into the storage block you can easily maintain incredible sharpness at home
DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL: Built to last from forged German stainless-steel with durable double-rivet construction, Ninja knives are rust resistant and strong enough for all your kitchen cutting tasks
PRECISION BLADES; Easily slice through tough ingredients and handle delicate food prep tasks with ease. Enjoy total control with ergonomic handles designed for maximum comfort, even with extended use

INCLUDES: 5 Piece Set – 20cm/8" Chef Knife, 20cm/8" Bread Knife, 20cm/8" Slicing Knife, 13cm/8” Utility Knife, 9cm/3.5” Paring Knife, Knife Block with Integrated Sharpener. Weight 2.4kg (total) Colour: Steel/Black
KNIFE BLOCK DIMENSIONS: H29.3cm x W14.5cm x D25.5 cm. 10-YEAR REPLACEMENT GUARANTEE: Upon registration with Ninja. When used as directed in the use and care guide.

Starts Sharp, Stays Sharp Simply lock a clean, dry blade into the StaySharp Knife Sharpener to restore its sharp edge in seconds, with just a few swipes of the lever. The dynamic stone sharpening wheel is engineered to engage your blade at the perfect angle and applies the optimum amount of pressure. Durable Stainless Steel Built to last from forged German stainless-steel with durable double-rivet construction. Precision blades easily slice through tough ingredients. Chopping and slicing has never been easier.
